pipeline.title: State
pipeline.desc: Ordered queue of groups per helicopter

pipeline.title: Score
pipeline.desc: H2 = sum of all helicopter finish times

pipeline.title: Search
pipeline.desc: HC climbs · SA explores with random jumps

operators.name: SWAP
operators.desc: Exchange two groups between helicopter queues

operators.name: Stochastic
operators.desc: Randomly picks swap or general branch

heuristics.name: H1
heuristics.desc: Mix of makespan (max heli time) and total time, weighted to spread load

heuristics.name: H2
heuristics.desc: Minimize sum of all helicopter completion times

heuristics.name: H3
heuristics.desc: H1 + penalty for priority groups rescued late (urgency-aware)

visual.h2Desc: — sum of per-helicopter completion times (batches of ≤15 people, ≤3 groups per sortie, 10 min base cooldown between sorties, travel ÷1.67, priority doubles per-person pickup time):
visual.mapDesc: — Random 2D layout (seed-fixed): two bases and seven groups. Colors show which helicopter owns each group after assignment.
visual.queuesDesc: — Each helicopter has an ordered list: rescue G2, then G5, … Swapping two groups anywhere changes the state.
visual.hcDesc: picks the best SWAP neighbor until stuck;
visual.saDesc: sometimes accepts worse moves to escape local minima.

probDesc: Helicopters leave bases and serve centers in an optimized order. Groups have sizes and priorities. Capacity: 15 people per trip, 10 min cooldown between sorties.
succNote2: ). Demo uses SWAP. Hover for details.
demoSub: HC / SA · 7 groups · 3 helicopters · runs in browser
howDesc1: Random 2D layout (seeded) with 2 bases and 7 groups. Colors = owning helicopter.
howDesc3: picks the best SWAP neighbor until stuck;
howDesc5: sometimes accepts worse moves to escape local minima.
webAppDesc: Run the Docker container to access the full interactive solver with all features below.

webAppFeatures.title: 2D Map Solver
webAppFeatures.desc: Interactive Canvas map with helicopter routes, group tooltips, and color-coded assignments

webAppFeatures.title: Experiment Dashboard
webAppFeatures.desc: Batch-run across seed ranges with boxplot comparisons of all algorithm configurations

webAppFeatures.title: Full Configuration
webAppFeatures.desc: All 3 heuristics, 6 successor functions, 3 initial states, and tunable SA parameters
